title: Ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: Official LangChain integration for Ollama, letting you use any Ollama-hosted model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; install from PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; install from npm as `ollama`.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images and compose examples for CPU & GPU inference.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, exposing Ollama models as generative & embedding components.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Streamlit app template for building local RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and LLM.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Chatbot-UI fork pre-configured to talk to any Ollama model via OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that uses Ollama for local AI-assisted note writing and summarization.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust client for Ollama, published on crates.io as `ollama-rs`.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local Ollama models into Slack channels.

title: awesome-ollama
summary: Curated list of tools, integrations, tutorials, and models for the Ollama ecosystem.
